title: Good Boy - Medium Rawhide Chomp Sticks - Dog Chews - Made From 100 Percent Natural Hide - Pack of 100 - Dog Treats Natural
features: KEEPING YOUR DOG BUSY: I'm brilliant for keeping your dog occupied and providing mental stimulation through chewing - which is a natural instinct for those four legged friends I'm great for relieving your dogs' boredom, and am a much more suitable treat than a shoe or a chair leg
NATURAL DOG TREATS: I’m gluten, wheat and cereal free and also contain no artificial nasties, including sugars and salt, unlike many processed treats

DOG CHEW TREATS: We all know dogs love to chew and my rawhide texture is great for your dogs' dental hygiene I may even help to reduce issues with your dogs' gums and tooth loss by helping to keep their jaw strong and your dogs’ teeth clean

SUITABLE FOR ALL DOGS: My favourite trick is making doggies tails' waggle and my size means I'm the perfect treat for dogs of all shapes and sizes.I am 125mm long and a maximum of 9mm wide - a perfect size for chewing fun
THE PERFECT TEXTURE: I'm tough enough to keep your dog busy, but not excessively hard like wood or antlers, meaning I do not cause broken teeth
description: From the manufacturer We know just how important it is to feed your dog the right treats for their size, age and breed. We also know how important treats are for making your dog super happy. So here at Good Boy we have a huge range of dog treats in all different shapes, flavours and sizes to suit every occasion of treating your dog. Why are Long-Lasting Chews so Paw-some? We know that sometimes you just need something (ANYTHING!) to keep your doggy occupied. Well Good Boy’s super-duper long-lasting occupy dog treats are perfect for all treating occasions. Using 100% natural rawhide, as well as rawhide alternatives, natural bones and meaty chews, our dog chews range is perfect for those moments when your dog deserves a tasty long-lasting treat. Rawhide treats also help to keep your dogs’ gnashers clean – after all, what dog doesn’t love to chew, chew and chew some more? Rawhide Chews Munchy Bites Natural Bones Meaty Chews Rawhide Free Chews Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 694 4.3 out of 5 stars 388 4.6 out of 5 stars 556 4.1 out of 5 stars 72 4.4 out of 5 stars 79 Price £19.20 £ 19 . 20 £7.19 £ 7 . 19 £26.35 £ 26 . 35 £34.00 £ 34 . 00 £21.98 £ 21 . 98 Available in these tasty flavours Braid (S,L), Knotted Bone(Mini,S,M,L,XL,Giant), Knuckle Bone (Mini,S,M,XL), Ring (S/M,L/XL), Chomp Stick (S,M,L,XL), Roll (Beef,Chicken,Mint,Pork), Shoe (M,L), Stick (S/M), Cigar, Tripe Filled, Strip, Shapes (Rugby,Sausage,Lollipop,HotDog,ChickenLeg) Munchy Rolls (Assorted, Small, Medium, Large), Munchy Strips (Assorted), Bonies (Mint, Chicken, Beef) Filled Bones (Tripe, Chicken, Meat, Bacon, Lamb & Rice, Venison), Roastie Bones (Mini, Maxi), Pork Bones Beef Jerky, Whole Pigs Ears, Pigs Ear Strips, Tripe Sticks, Paddywack Chicken Wrapped Rawhide Alternative Bones (7, 2), Starfish Chew Find your occupy favourites: Natural rawhide makes a tough, long-lasting chew - find the shape and size which is right for your dog Chewy munchy treats make a great longer-lasting reward treat Give your dog a bone - a natural treat, filled with tasty meat or simply roasted for flavour Wonderfully chewy, natural, meaty treats - the chewy texture keeps your dog busy and the natural ingredients are ridiculously tasty Tasty alternatives to traditional rawhide - with a chewy texture, or wrapped in tasty chicken. Love these long-lasting treats? Find more favourites from Good Boy... Real Meat Treats Tasty real meat treats are roasted in their natural juices to keep that delicious meaty flavour – meaning they’re super scrummy, nutritious and wholesome. With low fat, high protein and grain free choices - you're bound to find your pooch's perfect treat. Natural Dental Treats Keep your dog's gnashers in tip-top condition with a daily dental chew. Dental dog treats promote teeth health, so they'll be grinning with delight! Tasty Reward Treats Ridiculously tasty, instant gratification treats are a great way to reward your pooch! Not only are our reward treats delicious, they’re nutritious too, made with natural meats and some even packed full of scrummy superfoods!
